sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n107256" key="u(perapaite/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπεραπαιτ-έω</orth>, <sense id="n107256.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">demand payment in excess of what is due,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cod.Just.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.4.26.7</biblScope> </bibl>:—hence <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπεραπαίτ-ησις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">demand for such payment,</tr_> ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.10.1.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
